raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "voice.md integration", "issue": "Voice data handling module lacks encryption and DPA verification, creating legal and security risks.", "recommended_fix": "Add end-to-end encryption for voice data in transit and at rest. Verify Soniox/Deepgram DPA status before enabling voice features."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "Energy Adaptation Law 2", "issue": "Workflow status undocumented; 'wa' flag suggests incomplete implementation despite file presence.", "recommended_fix": "Document completion status and verification steps for Energy Adaptation in all products."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": "Voice data processing without encryption violates GDPR and AZ PDPA.", "next_files_to_read": ["docs/PRE-LAUNCH-BLOCKERS-STATUS.md", "apps/api/app/routers/voice.py"]}

findings.issue: Voice data handling module lacks encryption and DPA verification, creating legal and security risks.
findings.recommended_fix: Add end-to-end encryption for voice data in transit and at rest. Verify Soniox/Deepgram DPA status before enabling voice features.

findings.issue: Workflow status undocumented; 'wa' flag suggests incomplete implementation despite file presence.
findings.recommended_fix: Document completion status and verification steps for Energy Adaptation in all products.

whistleblower_flag: Voice data processing without encryption violates GDPR and AZ PDPA.
